message.content:
This section provides a data-driven overview of mobile game advertising trends in the Middle East for 2025, structured to answer the following retrieval queries:

- **Market Scale & Growth Metrics:** What are the year-over-year growth rates and absolute volumes for mobile game advertisers and ad creatives in the region? (Advertisers: 21.1W, +58% YoY; Deduplicated creatives: 29.9M, +54% YoY)
- **Creative Format Distribution:** What is the dominant ad format type? (Video creatives account for 77.7% of placements)
- **Top-Performing Titles:** Which specific mobile games are highlighted as hot or trending in ad campaigns? (Vita Mahjong, Zen Color, Bingo Voyage, Legend of Elements, Top Tycoon, Umamusume: Pretty Derby)
- **Monthly Trend Analysis:** How do advertiser counts, new creative ratios, and total material volumes fluctuate from January to December 2025? (Includes monthly new-material advertiser ratios ranging from 45.4% to 53.3%, and monthly new-material ratios ranging from 42.8% to 50.9%)
- **Platform/OS Distribution:** What is the reported system or platform share for ad placements? (Listed as 77%)
- **Regional & Genre Claims:** Does the text reference other markets or genre-specific performance? (Yes, notes Europe as a primary market for puzzle/casual games, with a new-material advertiser share near 80% and a placement peak in 2025Q2)
- **Data Provenance & Scope:** What is the data source and observation period? (Source: 广大大 Advertiser Analysis Module; Date Range: January 2025–December 2025)
- **Figures & Tables:** What visual data representations are included? (Monthly trend charts for advertiser counts and material volumes, metric summary cards, and a ranked hot-product list)

response_text:
This section provides a data-driven overview of mobile game advertising trends in the Middle East for 2025, structured to answer the following retrieval queries:

- **Market Scale & Growth Metrics:** What are the year-over-year growth rates and absolute volumes for mobile game advertisers and ad creatives in the region? (Advertisers: 21.1W, +58% YoY; Deduplicated creatives: 29.9M, +54% YoY)
- **Creative Format Distribution:** What is the dominant ad format type? (Video creatives account for 77.7% of placements)
- **Top-Performing Titles:** Which specific mobile games are highlighted as hot or trending in ad campaigns? (Vita Mahjong, Zen Color, Bingo Voyage, Legend of Elements, Top Tycoon, Umamusume: Pretty Derby)
- **Monthly Trend Analysis:** How do advertiser counts, new creative ratios, and total material volumes fluctuate from January to December 2025? (Includes monthly new-material advertiser ratios ranging from 45.4% to 53.3%, and monthly new-material ratios ranging from 42.8% to 50.9%)
- **Platform/OS Distribution:** What is the reported system or platform share for ad placements? (Listed as 77%)
- **Regional & Genre Claims:** Does the text reference other markets or genre-specific performance? (Yes, notes Europe as a primary market for puzzle/casual games, with a new-material advertiser share near 80% and a placement peak in 2025Q2)
- **Data Provenance & Scope:** What is the data source and observation period? (Source: 广大大 Advertiser Analysis Module; Date Range: January 2025–December 2025)
- **Figures & Tables:** What visual data representations are included? (Monthly trend charts for advertiser counts and material volumes, metric summary cards, and a ranked hot-product list)
